name: New Claim - Email Link (declines SMS)
description: Caller prefers email instead of SMS for the form link.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I need to start a warranty claim, but don't text me - can you email it?
expectedOutcome: Agent confirms new-claim path, collects and read-back-confirms the email, sends the email with link + step-by-step instructions to greenbeanbattery.com > Warranty > Submit a Claim, sets the post-submission expectations.
expectedMilestones: email collected and confirmed via read-back
